title: Class that extends a parent class
description: TS `class Sub extends Base {…}` — same merging as interface inheritance, but on the KindClass branch. Inherited data members appear in the child class's Children alongside its own.
notes: Validated structurally — a plain object `{a: "x", b: 1}` PASSES (no `instanceof` check); inherited props are checked directly alongside the child's own, so a missing parent prop fails just like a missing own prop.
generated: function YOw_fPLNRll(v){return (typeof v === 'object' && v !== null && Number.isFinite(v.b) && typeof v.a === 'string')}
